'''Dolomar''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]]. The mostly [[Human/Legends|Human]] population lived underground to avoid the bitter [[Temperature/Legends|cold]]. The largest of these underground complexes, [[Diflu]], was located in the northernmost [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the [[L'tiri Peaks]]. The [[Local day/Legends|local day]] lasted 45 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]. The [[Local year|local]] [[Standard year/Legends|year]] lasted 224 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. Its hydrosphere was mostly solidified as glaciers and snow.

==History==
===Early history===
Originally a colony of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the world became quickly settled due to several large deposits of [[Ore/Legends|ores]] and various specialized [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] and [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]]. The planet's 1.5 billion citizens maintained a participatory [[Democracy/Legends|democracy]]. Besides valuable mineral deposits, the world was an exporter of a local spiced wine, which was popular in many galactic [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]].

===New Republic===
Dolomar quickly allied itself with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] when [[Dolomar resistance|local resistance forces]] ousted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] governor, but was subjected to heavy fighting during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. Safe in their deep cavern [[City/Legends|cities]], the Dolomars were protected from orbital bombardment. The Empire learned the stubborn resolve of the natives the hard way- the initial invasion force was ambushed and wiped out.

The world became a hotly contested battle zone, with New Republic fleet units and local Dolomar defense forces holding back the Imperial invasion fleet. Those Imperial transports that managed to slip past the defensive array of New Republic warships often found themselves shot down by crack Dolomar gunners, manning anti-aircraft weapons scattered across the planet. Those few Imperial forces that managed to land found themselves quickly cut off and eliminated by local inhabitants fighting from hidden passages and caves.

The battle for the world was so important that New Republic [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] personally inspected units assigned to protect the world.<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>

At some point the New Republic transferred the capital of the sector from Dolomar to [[Caprioril]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
